files_created.change_summary: Created new shell script that fetches and pulls the latest changes from origin main. Includes safety checks for uncommitted changes, clear status messages on success and failure, and follows the same conventions as existing scripts in scripts/.
files_created.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== Forge Update ==="
echo ""

# Ensure we are inside a git repository
if ! git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Error: Not a git repository. Please run this script from the project root."
  exit 1
fi

# Check for uncommitted changes
if ! git diff --quiet || ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
  echo "Error: You have uncommitted local changes."
  echo "Please commit or stash your changes before updating."
  echo ""
  git status --short
  exit 1
fi

# Fetch latest changes
echo "Fetching latest changes from origin..."
if ! git fetch origin main; then
  echo ""
  echo "Update failed: Could not fetch from origin. Check your network connection."
  exit 1
fi

# Pull latest changes
echo "Pulling latest changes into current branch..."
if ! git pull origin main; then
  echo ""
  echo "Update failed: Could not pull from origin main."
  echo "There may be merge conflicts that need to be resolved manually."
  exit 1
fi

echo ""
echo "Update complete. You are now up to date with origin/main."
